path: PNGS/Aqa ﷺ says Ali is Ally of Believers after him.png
text: Narrated 'imran bin Husain: that the Messenger of Allah (&) cispatohed an army and he put ‘Al bin Abi Talib in charge of it. He left on the expedition and he entered upon a fomale slave. So four of the Gompanions of the Messenger of Allah (%) scolded him, ‘and they made a pact saying: [l we meet the Messenger of Alld (%) we willinform him of what *Ali cic. When the Musiims retumed from the journey. they would begin with the Messenger of Alah (#) and give him Salam, then they would go to their homes. So when the expediion aived, they gave ‘Salam to the Prophet (%), and one of the four stood saying: "0 Messenger of Allah! Do you see that *Al bin Abi Talib did such and such." The Messenger of Allah () tumed away from fim. Then the second one stood and said as he said, and he turned away from him. Then the third stood before him, and ‘said as he said, and he tumed away from him. Then the fourth stood and said s they had said. The Messenger of Alldh (#) faced him, and the anger was visible on his face, he seid: “"What do you want from *Ali?! What do you want from "Aii?l What do you want from A1 Indeed Al is from me, and | am from him, and he is the ally of every believer after me." Grade: Hasan (Darussalam) Reference : Jami® at-Tirmidhi 3712
